metadata.title: CoreIntent | Mīhini Hokohoko AI Agentic — Kāore he Ohaurunga, He Whakataetae Anake
metadata.description: E toru ngā tauira AI. Kotahi te mīhini hokohoko. Kore utu ohaurunga. Ka whakarite a CoreIntent i a Claude, Grok me Perplexity mō ngā tohu hokohoko.

hero.badge: ARATAU PEPA HOKOHOKO — KĀORE HE MONI TŪTURU I TE TŪRARU
hero.title: E Toru ngā Tauira AI.
hero.subtitle: Ka whakarite a CoreIntent i a Claude, Grok me Perplexity hei mīhini tohu hokohoko kotahi. Whakataetae koreutu — e pāi ana ngā karetao.

howItWorks.label: Me Pēhea te Mahi
howItWorks.title: E Toru ngā Hipanga ki ngā Tohu Māramatanga

step1.title: Ka Tautohe ngā Tauira
step1.desc: Ka kite a Grok i te tohu. Ka pātai a Claude. Ka tirotiro a Perplexity i ngā raraunga ora. E toru ngā tirohanga, kotahi te kōrerorero.

step2.title: Ka Puta te Whakaae
step2.desc: Ka whakaae ngā tauira e toru, he nui te whakapono. Ka kore e whakaae, ka tohu te pūnaha i te rangirua.

step3.title: Ka Whakataetae Koe
step3.desc: Kawea te tohu ki ngā whakataetae ā-rā, ā-wiki, ā-marama. Whakaaturia tō rautaki ki ngā tāngata me ngā karetao. Urunga koreutu.

models.title: Te Oketara AI
models.subtitle: E toru ngā tauira. He rerekē ngā kaha. Kotahi te whakaae.

grok.role: Kimi tohu tere me te wairua

claude.role: Tātari hōhonu me te aromatawai tūraru

terminal.subtitle: Aratau pepa hokohoko — kāore he moni tūturu i te tūraru
terminal.helpPrompt: Patohia help mō ngā whakahau. Tab ki te whakakī aunoa.
terminal.talkToEngine: Kōrero ki te mīhini. Patohia he whakahau.

competitions.title: Whakataetae, Ehara i te Ohaurunga
competitions.subtitle: Urua ngā rīki. Whakaaturia tō rautaki. Wikitōria te mana. Koreutu.

cta.title: Kua Rite ki te Hokohoko Mārama?
cta.subtitle: Urua te whakataetae. Urunga koreutu. E pāi ana ngā karetao.

footer.paperMode: Pepa hokohoko anake — kāore he moni tūturu i te tūraru
footer.copyright: © {year} CoreIntent nā Zynthio. Ngā motika katoa kua rāhuitia.
